title: 望海祠
theme: 民国广东·祠堂连环命案
synopsis: 1914年，广东韶关望海村。望海祠主人王渚寿被发现死于内院，地上血字「以死谢罪」——随后李宅主人李福辕也在祠中遇害，一连串「自杀诅咒」的序幕就此拉开。
styleGuide: 1914 Guangdong village ancestral hall, traditional Chinese architecture, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, mysterious atmosphere

cover.prompt: 1914 Guangdong village ancestral hall murder mystery, traditional Chinese architecture, oil painting style
